discovery.name: Composition III
discovery.statement: Every held work speaks through one continuous FoldForge voice while independent evidence dimensions govern its register, articulation, spatial position, and spectral motion.

evidence.inclusionPolicy: same visible holdings as Composition I

transformations.input: state hash, luminance mean and contrast, collection count, and collection diversity
transformations.output: a deterministic six-phase evolution through ground, fold, recurrence, fracture, convergence, and silence
five-degree minor-pentatonic field spanning three octaves
stable harmonic intensity and micro-detuning within one sine-and-triangle FoldForge instrument
stable pulse duration from 360 to 440 milliseconds
event duration from percussive strike to sustained tone
filter cutoff from shadowed low-pass to illuminated high-frequency field

transformations.input: current witness and most recent distinct prior witness
transformations.output: entered works, removed-work echoes, and changed-luminance pitch bends

transformations.input: frequency clusters produced by current work luminance

transformations.output: autonomously selected, memory-bearing, motif-recurring, gain-normalized arrangement layers through one compressed unified voice with restrained recursive delay

presentation.title: Sound composition
presentation.interfaceStatement: One voice / value as register / token as pulse / collection as field
presentation.consent: Sound never autoplays and begins only through explicit listener action.
instrumentFamilies: Fold voice: sine fundamental, triangle harmonic, slow frequency movement
presentation.spatialTreatment: stereo field with bounded recursive delay

evolution.humanControl: The listener may witness or silence the composition. No phase, arrangement, or layer is manually selectable.
evolution.ground: Luminance ascent establishes the tonal center.
evolution.fold: Dark and light extremes answer inward.
evolution.recurrence: Collection and contract relations form one or two simultaneous motifs according to archive diversity.
evolution.fracture: Luminance contrast determines whether two or three independent arrangements open the field.
evolution.convergence: Ascent and lineage seek a shared center without changing their individual order.
evolution.silence: A state-derived rest preserves absence before the cycle reforms.
evolution.phaseDuration: Event budgets are deterministically derived from the state hash.
evolution.stateChange: A holdings change produces a new witness hash and therefore a newly proportioned evolution.

memory.source: the most recent locally retained witness whose state hash differs from the current witness
memory.enteredWork: A newly present work retains its normal evidence-derived identity with a bounded 16 percent event emphasis.
memory.removedWork: Up to four removed works return once at low gain as echoes when Convergence begins.
memory.shiftedWork: When measured luminance changes by at least 0.01, the fundamental bends from its prior frequency into its current frequency.
memory.absence: When no prior witness exists, the system declares a first witnessed state and invents no history.

motifs.recognition: Works are grouped by their evidence-derived frequency and ranked by number of source works with deterministic tie-breaking.
motifs.retention: The five strongest frequency clusters are retained as motifs for the current witness.
motifs.recurrence: Outside Ground, a state-derived interval reintroduces a motif work at low gain without changing phase event counts.

layering.startRelationship: all arrangements selected by the current evolutionary phase begin together
layering.independence: each arrangement advances according to the pulse of the work currently encountered in that layer
layering.gainRule: per-event amplitude is divided by the square root of the number of active phase layers
layering.identityRule: layering changes event concurrence only; it never changes a work's evidence-derived sonic identity

arrangements.rule: Composition I order from darkest to lightest
Composition I order reversed from lightest to darkest
alternate the darkest remaining work with the lightest remaining work until the sequence reaches its center
group by collection name, then order each body by luminance and token identity
order by contract address and then numeric token ID
order by a stable hash of the composition state hash and token identity

lineage.revisionTrigger: A memory rule, motif rule, evolutionary phase, phase transition, arrangement, layering, pitch, voice, scheduling, duration, or gain change requires a new grammar version.

authority.claims: The score is a deterministic translation of the current archive state.
authority.doesNotClaim: The score reproduces source audio, artist intention, emotion, or valuation.
